function.name: ask
function.description: Interactively ask the user a question only when essential information is required to proceed. Do not use to ask for permission.

question.description: The question to ask the user

mode.description: Response mode: free text, multiple choice, or single choice

commonErrors.solution: User did not respond within timeout period
commonErrors.suggestedAction: Rephrase question more clearly or provide more context
Re-present options to user for selection
Resume from last completed step or ask for confirmation
